name: Allego
description: Allego is an AI-powered sales enablement and revenue training platform providing a REST API for managing video coaching, content libraries, certifications, rep readiness assessments, conversation intelligence, and deal intelligence to help revenue teams improve performance.

hasPart.name: Allego API
hasPart.description: REST API for the Allego sales enablement platform enabling programmatic access to video coaching sessions, content libraries, learning modules, certifications, rep readiness assessments, conversation intelligence, and deal intelligence data.
